title: Assistant Store Manager - Pizza Hut India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Pizza Hut India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Pizza Hut India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pizza Hut India:
Pizza Hut India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India!
